name: open-lagrange
description: Durable reconciliation around non-deterministic cognitive functions.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @open-lagrange/core && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @open-lagrange/core && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/core && npm run typecheck -w @open-lagrange/cli
